MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 10, 2003
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Leticia Perez. Doris Cheng, Esq. represented Plainitff Derek Yuen. Derek Yuen was sworn and examined. Based on the evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as prayed for in the petition.
